description: Known Prisma drift patterns to ignore or sanitize during migration creation

protectedIndexes.name: idx_memories_embedding
protectedIndexes.description: IVFFlat vector index for BGE embeddings (384 dims) - Prisma can't represent Unsupported type indexes
protectedIndexes.recreateSQL: CREATE INDEX "idx_memories_embedding" ON "memories" USING ivfflat ("embedding" vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists = 50);

protectedIndexes.name: memories_chunk_group_id_idx
protectedIndexes.description: Partial index with WHERE clause - Prisma generates non-partial version causing conflicts
protectedIndexes.recreateSQL: CREATE INDEX "memories_chunk_group_id_idx" ON "memories"("chunk_group_id") WHERE "chunk_group_id" IS NOT NULL;

protectedIndexes.name: idx_memory_facts_embedding
protectedIndexes.description: IVFFlat vector index for fact similarity retrieval (memory Phase 2). Dropping it silently degrades fact queries to sequential scans as the table grows.
protectedIndexes.recreateSQL: CREATE INDEX "idx_memory_facts_embedding" ON "memory_facts" USING ivfflat ("embedding" vector_cosine_ops) WITH (lists = 50)

ignorePatterns.reason: IVFFlat vector index cannot be represented in Prisma schema
Prisma generates non-partial index, but we need the partial version
Partial index cannot be represented in Prisma schema

Partial unique index with WHERE clause cannot be represented in Prisma schema (mirrors llm_configs_global_name_unique)
Partial index with WHERE clause cannot be represented in Prisma schema
CHECK constraint added in Identity Epic Phase 5 — Prisma doesn't represent CHECK constraints so future migrate diffs try to drop it
CHECK constraint added in Identity Epic Phase 5 (snowflake-name tripwire) — Prisma doesn't represent CHECK constraints so future migrate diffs try to drop it

FK made DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE in migration 20260418010642 so db-sync can atomically insert both sides of the users↔personas circular NOT NULL FK pair in one transaction. Prisma schema can't express DEFERRABLE so future diffs try to strip it.
FK made DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE in migration 20260418010642 for the users↔llm_configs circular pair. Prisma schema can't express DEFERRABLE.
FK made DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE in migration 20260418010642 for the users↔personas circular pair. Prisma schema can't express DEFERRABLE.
FK made DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE in migration 20260418010642 for the users↔llm_configs circular pair. Prisma schema can't express DEFERRABLE.

FK made DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE in migration 20260504065151 so db-sync can copy a user row with non-NULL default_tts_config_id before the matching tts_configs row arrives in the target DB (mirrors the LLM/persona pattern from migration 20260418010642). Prisma schema can't express DEFERRABLE.

FK made DEFERRABLE INITIALLY IMMEDIATE in migration vision_config_kind so db-sync can copy a user row with non-NULL default_vision_config_id before the matching (vision-kind) llm_configs row arrives (mirrors the LLM/TTS circular-FK pattern). Prisma schema can't express DEFERRABLE.
IVFFlat index on memory_facts.embedding managed outside Prisma (Unsupported vector type)
